description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named test that runs in the default test stage using the runner's default Docker image. The job should execute the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -qy, curl --silent --location https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_0.12 | bash -, apt-get install -y nodejs, npm install gulp -g, npm install, and gulp test. No additional stages, caches, artifacts, variables, services, or conditional rules are required.
